reviews.review_msg: I don't know why ppl say he is a hard prof. If you only understand his notes and do all the quetions he provides for every tutorial, I bet you can get a b+ at least. I am a non-english speaking student and took his course for my first term, finally I got A+ and my friend who is also a non-english speaking guy got an A. So, I think the locals should

Such a hard class!  Aside from the many issues I had with my TA, Les was a bit of a nightmare.  In order to cram way too much info into lecture, we gives "notes"; but for those of us who need to write notes to learn, he has NO sympathy.  I had to sacrifice my social life in order to scrape by with a "B" in this class.  Don't take this class!
organized, good notes, not bad at explaining.....exam questions were very fair, might be a little too long tho, gotta know the material well to finish it on time

Listen in class and take notes! Lecs and tuts are a must. MT material was easy. Just make sure you understand the main concept and ask for help if needed. TA had a heavy accent but it was okay. Got an A on MT and ended up with A-. I thought the final commentary questions were hard. Doing the hwk is key! Overall,not bad.

Mr. Marshall is a professor who's a genius at what he KNOWS. However, it doesn't make him one when he cannot explain in the easiest sense what he's talking about. The terminology in itself is really hard to understand. He further complicates this task when he's unable to provide clear examples. Also, his TA's don't know anything about Economics.

this prof is just rediculous with his damn TAs. Questions in MT and finals are all short or LONG answers. no freakin Mc at all. each question worth at least 5-20marks. so good luck guys if you gonna take this course with him. im on probation just cuz of this damn prof

yeah, crazy marking scheme. If you think you are good at economy, don't take it with this prof, otherwise you will be surprised when seeing your final grade. I didn't take the comments here, and i took this course. I knew all the concepts, and i was hoping to get A+, but i got A-. Avoid him -- comment from student with CGPA over 4.0

course is easy, but their marking is really stupid. You have to write all the garbage info to get over 80%. The TA called IDEEN is really****(not sure about the others). He can't speak English, and doesn't know economy at all. If you copy his answer, sure you won't get 100%. Avoid this prof if you can to avoid the unfair marking -- seriously

He has good notes, although you have to attend lecture to fill some stuff. His exams are straight from his notes but the marking is way too hard. Amount of detail needed is ridiculous. May waste too much time talking about unnecessary things and don't bother asking him questions. he'll brush you off or wont listen to you entirely.

Monotone. Great lecture notes (text is useless). TA sucks at english and teaching.  MT was alright for me but class average was like 50 and Final I'm not sure what the average was but seemed easier than MT.

hes a pretty good prof. his voice is boring but if you can follow what hes talking about, you'll be able to focus. loves his job... i dont remember how many times he used to same american economy example. loves his work. MUST UNDERSTAND THE AE/AD CURVE OR WILL FAIL. lots of graphs. overall, pretty good prof but must be willing to work to get grade.
a great prof...his notes are really helpful and clear. although midterm is hard, final is straight forward :) i will definately take another class with marshall

It is a really boring lectures, monotone. It is hard to pay attention to the class and he just like read his lecture notes. He gave us one midterm exam and almost all of us fail that midterm. I havent done my final yet, but i think i will fail the final for sure, it gonna be weight by 80% of the course. Crazy!!!!!

I slept through all the lectures I went to, even though I tried to stay awake, until I stopped going.  Not even coffee keeps me awake there.  He marks ridiculously difficultly; I checked my answers with what my TA wrote and I pretty much wrote exactly what was on there but I ended up getting 4/10 and stuff.... he's ok I guess but... there's better.

Well I failed the midterm, don't know about the final, yet. However, to be completely honest, he really knows what he is talking about, and gives out pretty good notes. The only thing that makes this course hard is his monotone voice, it puts people to sleep sometimes. So if you can get a friend to take all the notes for you, you can just sleep.

Boring lectures, monotone.  He is a tough marker on exams and assignments. My TA has heavy accent and talks in such soft tone.  No one understands what he is talking.  Very useless TA. Always late to class and leave early. Don't take his class for mark booster. Stay away!!!

I agree!! AVOID HIM AT ALL COSTS!! he talks very slow and monotone.. my ta was ideen and he was the worst ta ever!! he can't even talk clearly, and marks hard. OVERALL, content was good but prof is horrible! he doesn't curve too!! BEWARE!!!

He's really mean and monotone... for the lectures I did show up to I fell asleep.  On exams, he's a REALLY hard marker.  I compared my answers with TA's and had exactly what he wrote but I got about 5/10.  Makes no sense...

BORING AND NIT PICKY PROF!! He chooses TAs that have heavy accent that's hard to understand. The level of detail he EXPECTS on a test is outrageous for a 100 level course. The class average for midterm is 33/80. he doesnt scale marks either. he then says we dont study and are lazy. I had 3.2 cgpa before his class .AVOID HIM AT ALL COSTS!

OMG he is the worse prof EVER. his marking is seriously ridiculous, he required so much detail in his exams and his assignments that it seem like he thinks we only have his class to study for. He require so much statistics in his answer. Avoid him at all cost unless u have a lot of free time to wrote like a 6 page assignment

His lecture is boring and his textbook sucks. The book is black and white with lots of boring graphs. Marshall fials lots students and one of the reason for such high fialing is because of his useless TAs. These TAs cant even speak clearly. ****TY CLASS

He is one hard marking prof. The problem is the TAs, they can't even speak proper english and their marking is horrible. The course needs good concentration, as for the text, many ppl didnt like it at all.

THE FUNNIEST PROFESSOR EVER! not a joke, he may be monotonous, but his examples are so damn funny, he should be a standup comedian. not only that, he is very clear and concise and helpful if you come ask. go to tutorials, work, think, laugh. i am very much looking forward to his future classes!

Excellent Notes... no need to go to the textbook. He wants prepare us for the future econ courses. If u do good at his Econ 105 and 103. U are pretty much ready to tackle other advance economics courses. Opinion from a 4th yr student

Ugh.. where to begin?  Terribly boring teacher.  Monotone voice.  HORRIBLE text (the Doug Allen one, seroiusly, it doesn't teach you ANYTHING. i had to use a UBC econ book to learn how to graph)  Gave bonus marks but the T.A.s marked mine wrong so he gave me extra 2 points and i LOST the bonus 2 points.  DO NOT TAKE HIM

Worst Prof ever.  I had all the correct answers for the midterm, but just because i didnt explain the way HE wanted them, i did not get full marks.  DO NOT TAKE ECON 103 with this guy.  There is a little chance of getting an A.  Do yourself a favor and go with anyone else, mess up your schedule and go with someone else.

I thought he was pretty good. We used the Doug Allen text and if you know your stuff you'll do fine, just read the text. I dont know where all the other negative ratings are comming from. The only thing is with his tests you have to be VERY VERY specific with your answer or you wont get any marks at all even if your overall answer is right...
I can't believe a teacher can be this horrible. At Douglas college he was bad ... at SFU still bad. Talk about making an improvement, NOT !!!!

Though his marking is tough, but if you study the notes hard, pay attention in class and actually read the text, u would be in a good shape! Then u dont really need that 20 hrs of studying to get a gd mark~ His notes are excellent & clear! I learned a lot! ^^

Stay away from his class!! Seriously guys, listen to me.. He's such a hard marker... I mean he's a funny guy, but he's absolutely ridiculous when it comes to marking..I have to re-take econ 103 cause of Les... Ruin your schedule and go with a different prof..you'll thank me..

since his monotone.. makes his lectures really boring.   the textbook that he uses.. don't really need for the exams . just study his notes... but you really have to put the time and effort into studying to get a decent mark in his class

good lecture notes, very clear-go to lecture n pay attn, it may be difficult cuz hes so monotone n boring but lecture is full of info. textbook is great up until the midterm, after that u can basically throw it away. final is very difficult! if u study for it for like 20 hours like he says u'd probably do well..i wouldnt kno
One of the dullest profs ever and makes you buy a textbook his buddy made that is a waste of time. Do not take this class with him... or get another prof.
For all of those pansies who are failing this course, you are all LAZY! This course is totally do able without scaling. Marshall is extremely clear and his notes are amazing
worst proff ever. does not scale. everyone is failing. DO NOT TAKE THIS COURSE if u dont need to. seriously.

Very Easy Course, but likes to Mark VERY VERY HARD. He does NOT SCALE, so everyone could fail and that would be alright with him. If at all possible, NEVER take a course with this man, if tehre is an alternative then take the alternative prof!
Horrible class, everyones failing. Don't take this class whatever you do. I don't think its a requirement for any program so no one should be taking this class. Lets boycott this ****

This guys marking scheme is ridiculus. Average on the second midterm was 51% and he says thats 3 semesters in a row now but he still doesn't want to curve the marks. I'm getting a B but could easily be gettin an A with a diff prof. The best mark in the class on both the midterms was around 75-80%. And the T.A. is an econ nazi. Really hard marking.

He has excellent notes. For exams, there is always something more he wants from your answers. He almost never gives out full marks. Class avg for the MTs are around 52% and 55%, and he won't really curve to help ppl.
No Comments

A very nice and easy going professor. exams are very fair and clear, just know the tutorial questions, but he is a very hard marker. Always draw a graph for every questions whether the qestion asks for it or not. on exams are from the notes, but u still need to study the text book.

worst prof ever.. doesnt know the material. very unorganized and confused. he ll write down a page of notes then cross them out.. he has no idea what hes doing, the material is interesting but hes a moron

A really good professor.. he may be picky in exams.. but if you understand what he wants in the questions you will do good.. concentrate on his notes, i didnt read the book and i got an A in his class.. try to have him as a TA as well it helps ...i think he is a great prof.. very helpfull and his exams are straight forward

always something more he wants in your answer!  He simply doesn't like to give full mark to any question. He get's easily pissed, just ask him to read your answer another time or remark your answer, then you will see how immat..e a prof can behave! not a very difficult course.

This guy's a total ****. Don't try to correct him, he's too insecure for that. Read like crazy. Avoid him if you can. He's very picky on the marking and then will claim that the class is lost. What a tool. Avoid him. Lame teacher. Nice personality. But lame teacher.

the material is not that difficult. but his exam marking is soooooo picky. also in the exam, only he asks is to memorize the whole thing in the note and write it down. JUST MEMORIZE.. that's the one thing he asks for,,,

Very nice & easy-going prof.! He will concenrate some questions during the lecture (tips for midterm). If u want to get A, read the textbook 1 time + his lecture notes (most of the questions u can find in the exam).

Course content is not easy, lectures are informative, if you think the text is useless, think again unless you only want a B. Marshall is amazing, nice instructor, fare profeesor, maybe little tough on exams but are curved. Read the text, focus on notes, you would get an A
Lectures are boring. Gives good notes. Questions are based on notes.
Lectures are brutal, but notes are clear and awesome.  No need to read textbook.  Funny man - wears pink shirts, swears a lot, talks about his wife a lot.
His notes are very clear and his midterms are fairly easy and mostly information from the notes

Not a very hard course. Notes are useful and materials are clear and concise. Very useful materials. Workload is not bad either. Exams are not tricky, but if you know the notes in and out, you should have no trouble passing. Marking is HARD, however.
Booooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooring lectures:) and exams r hard and not fair.. good luck with his class if u get him
TAKE NOTES, PEOPLE! Or, if you're lucky like our class, download them ALL off the e-mail. Study them, highlight them. Forget the textbook. Useless. Only notes....noooootes.
No Comments
Tests come straight out of notes and is quite clear.  When you need help he is more than willing to help.  Good guy to talk to because he is very knowledeable.  PS-Likes to use the word God Dam
No Comments
No Comments
No Comments
No Comments
No Comments
Good notes (emails them out before lecture), interesting lectures
boring lectures, but it's economics! the best teacher I have had in econ
No Comments
I like his notes.......so we don't need to study the whole text book
bored lecure...ZzzZzzz
Tough, but quite knowledgable
No Comments
vague range of midterm and final exam, extremely little office hour
Ideas are straight forwards but not clear on what he is looking for on exams.
No Comments
very cold and impersonal
No Comments
His stuff is easy, and his notes are well organized.
